HEARING RE: DEFENDANT NAUPREET SINGH'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. Notice of settlement of entire action filed on May 11, 2023.

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NAUPREET SINGH'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

Naupreet Singh's "motion for change of venue" was filed on March 27, 2023, only 10 court days before the April 11 hearing date he selected; the motion is thus ordered off calendar as untimely. (See CCP 1005 [16 days].) The motion is also noncompliant with Local Rule 2.7(B

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
